title: Yas Clinic Group to manage Sheikh Khalifa Hospital in Fujairah | HealthCare Middle East & Africa - No.1 Health & Pharma Manufacturing Industry Publication
summary: Sheikh Khalifa Hospital spans approximately 89,000 square metres and currently accommodates 222 beds.
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
